description_long: This is a thick, hardbound book with a dark green cover and brown leather-like corners and spine. The cover features embossed gold text and a subtle, shadowy illustration of a figure, giving it an antique or vintage appearance. The book's pages are visibly aged, with a yellowed, slightly rough texture along the edges. The spine is decorated with gold text, a small emblem, and a stylized illustration, adding to its ornate, classic look. The corners and spine are reinforced, suggesting durability and a premium binding. The overall design evokes the feel of an old, collectible volume, possibly from a library or private collection.
description: A thick, vintage-style hardbound book with a dark green cover, brown leather-like spine and corners, and gold embossed details. The cover features a shadowy illustration and ornate spine decorations.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing the gold embossed title and a faint illustration, with brown corners and a thick, aged page block.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the top, highlighting the full expanse of the green cover, brown leather-like corners, and the subtle illustration.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from the opposite edge, showing the thickness of the pages and the brown spine wrapping around the corner.
description_view_3: The spine is fully visible, displaying gold text, a small emblem, and decorative elements, with the brown leather-like material prominent.
attribute_cover_illustration: The cover features a shadowy, monochromatic illustration of a figure, possibly a historical or literary character, rendered in a subtle, almost ghostly style. The image is partially obscured by the dark green background and blends into the cover, giving it a mysterious, vintage feel.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is brown with gold embossed text running horizontally, including the title, volume number, and a small decorative emblem. There is also a stylized illustration and a label-like section near the top, all in gold, giving the spine an ornate, classic appearance.
